languages.text: "Это и случилось с нашими братьями и сестрами. Мы вместе бежали от ксеносов, вместе делили кров и пищу. Однако когда голод начал сводить с ума, многие предпочли поддаться внутреннему зверю, а не вверить жизни воле Вековечного".

traits.locale_text: "Это и случилось с нашими братьями и сестрами. Мы вместе бежали от ксеносов, вместе делили кров и пищу. Однако когда голод начал сводить с ума, многие предпочли поддаться внутреннему зверю, а не вверить жизни воле Вековечного".

languages.text: "This is what happened to our brothers and sisters. We fled the xenos together, shared both food and shelter. But when hunger started to drive people insane, many chose to submit to the inner beast instead of entrusting their lives to the Emperor's will."
languages.original_text: "Это и случилось с нашими братьями и сестрами. Мы вместе бежали от ксеносов, вместе делили кров и пищу. Однако когда голод начал сводить с ума, многие предпочли поддаться внутреннему зверю, а не вверить жизни воле Вековечного".

traits.locale_text: "This is what happened to our brothers and sisters. We fled the xenos together, shared both food and shelter. But when hunger started to drive people insane, many chose to submit to the inner beast instead of entrusting their lives to the Emperor's will."

"This is what happened to our brothers and sisters. We fled the xenos together, shared both food and shelter. But when hunger started to drive people insane, many chose to submit to the inner beast instead of entrusting their lives to the Emperor's will."

"This is what happened to our brothers and sisters. We fled the xenos together, shared both food and shelter. But when hunger started to drive people insane, many chose to submit to the inner beast instead of entrusting their lives to the Emperor's will."

languages.text: "Das ist es, was unseren Brüdern und Schwestern passiert ist. Wir flohen gemeinsam vor den Xenos, teilten Nahrung und Unterkunft. Aber als der Hunger begann, die Menschen in den Wahnsinn zu treiben, zogen es viele vor, sich der inneren Bestie zu unterwerfen, anstatt ihr Leben dem Willen des Imperators anzuvertrauen."
languages.original_text: "This is what happened to our brothers and sisters. We fled the xenos together, shared both food and shelter. But when hunger started to drive people insane, many chose to submit to the inner beast instead of entrusting their lives to the Emperor's will."

languages.text: "C'est ce qui est arrivé à nos frères et sœurs. Nous avons fui les xénos ensemble, nous avons partagé la nourriture et les abris. Mais quand la faim a commencé à rendre les gens fous, beaucoup ont choisi de se soumettre à la bête intérieure plutôt que de confier leur vie à la volonté de l'Empereur."
languages.original_text: "This is what happened to our brothers and sisters. We fled the xenos together, shared both food and shelter. But when hunger started to drive people insane, many chose to submit to the inner beast instead of entrusting their lives to the Emperor's will."

languages.text: "这就是我们兄弟姐妹的遭遇。我们一起逃离异种，分享食物和住所。但当饥饿开始让人发疯时 许多人选择了屈服于内心的野兽 而不是将生命托付给皇帝的意志"
languages.original_text: "This is what happened to our brothers and sisters. We fled the xenos together, shared both food and shelter. But when hunger started to drive people insane, many chose to submit to the inner beast instead of entrusting their lives to the Emperor's will."

languages.text: "Esto es lo que les pasó a nuestros hermanos y hermanas. Huimos juntos de los xenos, compartimos comida y refugio. Pero cuando el hambre empezó a volver loca a la gente, muchos eligieron someterse a la bestia interior en lugar de confiar sus vidas a la voluntad del Emperador".
languages.original_text: "This is what happened to our brothers and sisters. We fled the xenos together, shared both food and shelter. But when hunger started to drive people insane, many chose to submit to the inner beast instead of entrusting their lives to the Emperor's will."

languages.text: "これが私たちの兄弟姉妹に起こったことだ。我々は共に異星人から逃れ、食料も住居も共有した。しかし、飢えが人々を狂わせ始めたとき、多くの者が皇帝の意志に命を委ねる代わりに、内なる獣に服従することを選んだ。"
languages.original_text: "This is what happened to our brothers and sisters. We fled the xenos together, shared both food and shelter. But when hunger started to drive people insane, many chose to submit to the inner beast instead of entrusting their lives to the Emperor's will."

languages.text: "Kardeşlerimizin başına gelen buydu. Xenos'lardan birlikte kaçtık, hem yiyeceği hem de barınağı paylaştık. Ancak açlık insanları çıldırtmaya başladığında, birçoğu hayatlarını İmparator'un iradesine emanet etmek yerine içlerindeki canavara boyun eğmeyi seçti."
languages.original_text: "This is what happened to our brothers and sisters. We fled the xenos together, shared both food and shelter. But when hunger started to drive people insane, many chose to submit to the inner beast instead of entrusting their lives to the Emperor's will."
